day5_lunch_chase_1.name: Me
day5_lunch_chase_1.text: *I ran. Burst through the classroom door. Didn't look back.*

day5_lunch_chase_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_chase_2.text: *The hallway. Fluorescent lights flicker. Footsteps echo. Mine. Yuna's. Two sets.*

day5_lunch_chase_3.name: Me
day5_lunch_chase_3.text: *Yuna follows behind. Running on legs still drugged. Stumbling — but not stopping.*

day5_lunch_chase_5.name: Me
day5_lunch_chase_5.text: *The broadcast echoes through the hallway. Teacher Eunsu's voice comes from everywhere. From the walls. From the ceiling. From beneath my feet.*

day5_lunch_chase_6.name: Eunsu
day5_lunch_chase_6.text: "...All the doors are locked. Come back."

day5_lunch_chase_7.name: Me
day5_lunch_chase_7.text: *A lie. Not all of them. There's the route Seolhwa told me about.*

day5_lunch_chase_8.name: Me
day5_lunch_chase_8.text: *The sealed hallway. A fork. Left — the main building. Right — the old wing.*

day5_lunch_chase_10.name: Me
day5_lunch_chase_10.text: *Footsteps from the left. — No, from the right too. 5 seconds. I have to decide in 5 seconds.*

day5_lunch_left_1.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_1.text: *End of the hallway. Sea is standing there.*

day5_lunch_left_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_2.text: *Arms spread, blocking the way. The sleeves of her uniform are trembling. The red glow of the emergency light illuminates only half of Sea's face.*

day5_lunch_left_3.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_3.text: *I stopped. I could push past her if I ran. — My body won't move.*

day5_lunch_left_5.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_5.text: *Sea's voice is cracked. She'd been crying. Before I got here. Alone in this hallway.*

day5_lunch_left_6.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_6.text: "I can't let you go. Not this time."

day5_lunch_left_7.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_7.text: *Sea's hands are clenched into fists. Trembling. Whether to stop me or to hold herself together, I can't tell.*

day5_lunch_left_8.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_8.text: "I know... I know I'm not in my right mind. But what am I supposed to do?"

day5_lunch_left_9.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_9.text: "If I let you go like this, we'll never see each other again! You'll leave me alone again!"

day5_lunch_left_10.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_10.text: "If they erase your memory, we can meet again. From the start again. You can smile at me again."

day5_lunch_left_11.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_11.text: "...On Day 1, when you said 'hello' to me. Every time that greeting — was like a knife. The greeting of a stranger."

day5_lunch_left_12.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_12.text: "But still — that one greeting kept me going until the next cycle."

day5_lunch_left_13.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_13.text: *Clang. The steel door on the 1st floor of the main building rattles. Someone is coming up. Footsteps echo on the stairs.*

day5_lunch_left_14.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_14.text: "That's not smiling at you. It's a stranger who doesn't know you smiling."

day5_lunch_left_20.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_20.text: "For 12 times, I let you pass in this hallway."

day5_lunch_left_22.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_22.text: "Teacher Eunsu doesn't know. The board doesn't know. Every time, on the night of Day 5, when you tried to escape — we met in this hallway. Every time. And every time — **I stepped aside.**"

day5_lunch_left_23.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_23.text: "You knew you couldn't escape without me stepping aside. Every time, crying. Every time — 'this is the last time.' But in the end, at the front gate, in the basement... you were always caught. And the next day, you'd open the classroom door again without even knowing my name!"

day5_lunch_left_24.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_24.text: "Every time your memory was erased, you came back. Day 1 again. A stranger's face again."

day5_lunch_left_25.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_25.text: "**...Do I have to step aside for the 13th time too?**"

day5_lunch_left_choice.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_choice.text: *Bang bang bang. The footsteps on the stairs grow closer. Second floor. They'll be here soon. Sea's lips tremble. She glanced toward the sound. — But still didn't move aside.*
choices: "...I'm sorry. But I have to go."

day5_lunch_left_c1_1.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_c1_1.text: *Sea wiped her tears. And — stepped aside.*

day5_lunch_left_c1_2.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_c1_2.text: "...I'll step aside for the 13th time too."

day5_lunch_left_c1_3.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_c1_3.text: "There won't be a next time. The 14th — won't happen. Because I won't step aside."

day5_lunch_left_c1_5.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_c1_5.text: *Footsteps reached the end of the hallway. No time to look back.*

day5_lunch_left_c1_7.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_c1_7.text: *Behind me — the sound of someone collapsing. A school uniform brushing the floor. And — muffled sobbing.*

day5_lunch_left_c2_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_c2_2.text: *Sea's eyes went wide. Like a word she never heard in 12 cycles.*

day5_lunch_left_c2_3.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_c2_3.text: "...If we go outside, will you remember me?"

day5_lunch_left_c2_5.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_c2_5.text: "...I don't even know what it's like out there."

day5_lunch_left_c2_6.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_c2_6.text: *Sea looked down at her own hands. She'd lived inside this school for 3 years. Bound to the role of a watcher. The outside world — was a place that didn't exist for Sea.*

day5_lunch_left_c2_7.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_c2_7.text: "...Are there hallways like this out there?"

day5_lunch_left_c2_9.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_c2_9.text: "...That's a lie. But I'll believe it."

day5_lunch_left_c2_10.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_left_c2_10.text: "...Even if outside is scary — it's probably better than here. Probably."

day5_lunch_left_c3_1.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_c3_1.text: *...The strength left my legs. I sank down in front of Sea. I can't run anymore.*

day5_lunch_right_1.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_1.text: *Running down the hallway — I stopped. The footsteps disappeared. The ones chasing from behind. The ones echoing on the stairs. All of them.*

day5_lunch_right_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_2.text: *...A thick fire shutter separating the old wing hallway from the main building has come down. Someone lowered it manually. Beyond the shutter, a siren wails faintly, but it doesn't reach here.*

day5_lunch_right_3.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_3.text: *I squeezed under the shutter. Standing up — it's quiet. The only quiet place in a sealed school.*

day5_lunch_right_4.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_4.text: *The infirmary door is open. Only one fluorescent light is on. The rest are broken — no, removed. Deliberately darkened.*

day5_lunch_right_5.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_5.text: *Teacher Riin is standing by the cabinet. She's not wearing her white coat. Casual clothes. — Like she's prepared to leave.*

day5_lunch_right_6.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_6.text: *Syringes lined up in a row. Label: 'Memory Erasure Protocol #13'. Needles glint beneath the fluorescent light.*

day5_lunch_right_8.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_8.text: "...Are you here to stop me too?"

day5_lunch_right_10.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_10.text: *I stepped back. My back hit the doorframe. Nowhere to run. Teacher Riin raised the syringe. A drop of liquid fell from the needle tip. — My legs went weak.*

day5_lunch_right_12.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_12.text: *Teacher Riin — slowly, deliberately slowly — set the syringe down on the sink. Clink. Metal against ceramic.*

day5_lunch_right_14.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_14.text: *Teacher Riin opened the cabinet. Vials lined up inside. She took one out and shook it. Clear liquid. Looks identical to what's in the syringes.*

day5_lunch_right_15.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_15.text: *Teacher Riin opened the cap. Brought it to her nose. Smelled it. — Then took a sip.*

day5_lunch_right_18.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_18.text: "Since the 7th. After Lee Seolhwa — after that child was gone. I replaced the drugs from the board with sugar water. For 6 years."

day5_lunch_right_20.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_20.text: *Teacher Riin smiled. Not a bitter smile — an exhausted one.*

day5_lunch_right_21.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_21.text: "When the 7th child — when Lee Seolhwa — was caught trying to escape with you. She screamed as they dragged her away."

day5_lunch_right_22.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_22.text: "I could hear it from the infirmary. Two floors down. ...Do you know what she said?"

day5_lunch_right_23.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_23.text: "It wasn't 'save me.' It was 'don't touch him.' ...She meant you. Even as she was being dragged away, she was worried about you."

day5_lunch_right_24.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_24.text: "...I can't forget that scream. That child was classified as 'uncorrectable.' You know what that means?"

day5_lunch_right_25.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_25.text: *Teacher Riin leaned against the cabinet. Shoulders slumped.*

day5_lunch_right_26.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_26.text: "...I'm supposed to be a doctor. I took an oath to save people... and for 6 years I've been rummaging around in children's heads. I'm so disgusted with myself I could die."

day5_lunch_right_27.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_27.text: "...It's laughable. I took an oath to do no harm. And for 6 years I erased memories."

day5_lunch_right_28.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_28.text: "After the 7th, I reduced the drug concentration. From the 8th onward, sugar water. So the memories wouldn't be fully erased."

day5_lunch_right_29.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_29.text: "I almost got caught once. During the 10th, Eunsu said 'the drug seems weaker.' I pretended to increase the dose and got through it."

day5_lunch_right_30.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_30.text: "...That's why you feel deja vu. Because your memories weren't fully erased. Because I made it that way."

day5_lunch_right_32.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_32.text: *Teacher Riin pulled a key from her pocket. A small silver key. The surface is worn. — Touched over and over again. For 6 years.*

day5_lunch_right_33.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_33.text: *Teacher held out the key. Her hand — isn't shaking. How long has she been waiting for this moment?*

day5_lunch_right_34.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_34.text: "Old wing, 3rd floor. The emergency exit Seolhwa found. This key opens it."

day5_lunch_right_35.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_35.text: "...Eunsu doesn't know this key exists. I changed the locks myself after the 7th."

day5_lunch_right_36.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_36.text: *...So that's why it was quiet here. Riin disabled the tracking system in this area. Riin lowered the shutter. The only blind spot beyond Eunsu's eyes.*

day5_lunch_right_37.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_37.text: *Bang! The fire shutter shook violently. Someone is pounding from outside. Eunsu, or the 'administration,' has caught up.*

day5_lunch_right_choice.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_choice.text: *The fire shutter rattled again. Metal screaming.*
choices: "...How do I know this isn't another experiment?"

day5_lunch_right_c1_1.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_c1_1.text: *I took the key. Small, cold, silver. In my hand — it feels heavy.*

day5_lunch_right_c2_1.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_c2_1.text: *Teacher Riin paused for a moment. Then — shook her head. "I have to stay. I need to hold the shutter so Eunsu can't follow." ...She pressed the key into my hand.*

day5_lunch_right_c3_1.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_c3_1.text: "...How do I know this isn't another experiment?"

day5_lunch_right_c3_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_c3_2.text: *Teacher Riin picked up a syringe and injected it into her own arm. The sugar water.*

day5_lunch_right_c3_4.name: Riin
day5_lunch_right_c3_4.text: "You're right to doubt. You shouldn't trust anyone here. Me included. But the key is real. Go."

day5_lunch_right_c3_5.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_c3_5.text: *Teacher gave a wry smile. I took the key.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_1.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_1.text: *The staircase up to the 3rd floor of the old wing. Supporting Yuna.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_2.text: *Halfway up the stairs — Seolhwa is standing there.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_3.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_3.text: *This time is different. Since seeing her in the mirror yesterday, I know Seolhwa is a hallucination. But — she's still visible. Clearly. Even knowing she's a hallucination, seeing this girl makes my chest ache. I know why now.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_5.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_5.text: "...Seolhwa. ...You're a hallucination, right? Something my memory created."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_7.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_7.text: *Seolhwa smiled. A sad, warm smile. Seolhwa sat on the stairs. Hugged her knees. — That posture. Familiar somehow. The same one I took when I broke down in front of the mirror on the night of Day 4.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_8.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_8.text: "That's right. I'm not here. A year ago — I disappeared from this school."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_9.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_9.text: "During the 7th cycle... I tried to escape with you. I found out this school's secret, told you everything, and we ran together."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_10.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_10.text: "Back then, I was a 'facility student' at this school. Transferred from an orphanage. ...I wasn't a test subject, but I knew about the experiments."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_11.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_11.text: "I passed you a note. 'You need to get out of this school. This place isn't what you think.' ...The 7th you — believed me. Right away."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_12.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_12.text: "That night, we ran together. To the 3rd floor emergency exit of the old wing. We didn't have a key, but we tried to break the window. — The noise gave us away and we were caught."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_13.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_13.text: "...I was caught. And your memory was erased."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_14.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_14.text: *Seolhwa's eyes are wet. — Tears of a hallucination. Tears that don't exist. But the pain in my chest is real.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_15.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_15.text: "...I'm sorry. For not remembering. ...We ran together in the 7th cycle. You were caught. And I — forgot."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_17.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_17.text: "It's not your fault. You didn't erase your own memory."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_18.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_18.text: "But your memory — couldn't fully erase me. Because Riin weakened the drugs."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_19.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_19.text: "So I kept living... inside your head like this. Sending warnings whenever you were in danger, showing you escape routes."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_20.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_20.text: "In the 8th cycle, I whispered 'don't look back' in the hallway. Your memory knew where the surveillance cameras were."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_21.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_21.text: "In the 10th, I showed you the basement location in a dream. They say you got up in your sleep and drew something in a notebook. ...You probably had no idea what it was when you woke up."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_22.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_22.text: "...Everything I know is things you know. Your desperately preserved memories... were just borrowing my shell to speak."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_23.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_23.text: "The words I say, the expressions I show, the tears I shed — they're all echoes of the real Lee Seolhwa. But I myself... am not real."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_24.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_24.text: "...So when you asked 'you're left-handed, right?' — that was also—"

day5_lunch_seolhwa_25.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_25.text: "Because I was there during the 7th. I knew you were left-handed."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_27.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_27.text: "**Remember me.** The name Lee Seolhwa. Just that one thing. **Please.**"

day5_lunch_seolhwa_28.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_28.text: *Light streams from Seolhwa's eyes. Not tears. Light.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_29.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_29.text: "...The 13th time is different. Riin switched the drugs. Your memories remain."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_c1_2.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_c1_2.text: "I'm not real. I'm a residual memory. If you go outside — I'll disappear."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_c1_3.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_c1_3.text: "It's okay. **The real Lee Seolhwa's memory will remain inside you.** Don't forget this time."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_c2_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_c2_2.text: *Seolhwa looked at her own hands. Her fingertips are blurry.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_c2_3.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_c2_3.text: "I'm your memory. If you get out of here... there's no need to send warnings anymore. Then I'll — slowly fade away."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_c2_6.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_c2_6.text: "Even if the real Lee Seolhwa died long ago... I still saved you this time. That's enough."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_1.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_1.text: "I'll guide you to the emergency exit. I know a way around Eunsu's blockades."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_2.text: *Seolhwa leads the way. Through the dark hallways of the old wing.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_3.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_3.text: *I can't hear Seolhwa's footsteps. She has no body. Only my footsteps echo in the hallway. The shoulder supporting Yuna is going numb.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_4.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_4.text: *The hallway is dark. I shone my phone light ahead. Seolhwa's back is visible — the light passes through her. Sometimes her outline flickers. Like a glitch.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_7.name: Seolhwa
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_7.text: "Left. This door isn't sealed. You can reach the 3rd floor through the storage passage."

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_8.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_8.text: *An old storage door. Covered in dust. I opened it. A narrow passage. Stairs visible between pipes and conduits.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_9.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_9.text: *I climbed up. One floor. Two floors. Water leaking from a pipe. Cold.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_10.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_10.text: *3rd floor. In front of the emergency exit.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_11.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_11.text: *Seolhwa is standing at the door. She turned and smiled. — Her outline flickered again. Growing dimmer.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_13a.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_13a.text: *I inserted the key. Turned it. Click.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_13b.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_13b.text: *Seolhwa placed her hand on the door. The lock — released from inside. A hallucination's hand opened a real lock. No — my memory knew the structure of this lock.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_14.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_14.text: *The door opened. Outside air rushed in. The cold air of dawn. — It feels like the first time I've breathed outside air since entering this school.*

day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_15.name: Me
day5_lunch_seolhwa_guide_15.text: *Seolhwa's hair swayed in the wind. — No. A hallucination's hair can't sway in the wind. My memory is showing me that.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_1.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_1.text: *From behind — footsteps. Coming up the stairs.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_2.text: *One step. One step. Slow. Not running. — As if she knew I'd be up here.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_3.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_3.text: *The footsteps grow closer. The sound of dress shoes hitting concrete. Teacher Eunsu's shoes.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_4.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_4.text: *Stopped. At the top of the stairs.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_5.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_5.text: *Teacher Eunsu appeared. Out of breath. Hair disheveled. — Not the composed appearance from the classroom.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_6.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_6.text: *Teacher catches her breath, forcing the corners of her mouth up. The usual gentle smile. But the facial muscles are twitching subtly. Losing control.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_7.name: Eunsu
day5_lunch_eunsu_7.text: "{name}... it's dangerous there. Come here. Come to your teacher..."

day5_lunch_eunsu_8.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_8.text: *As I stepped back, the smile that had been clinging to Teacher Eunsu's face fell away with a snap. The mask shattered.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_9.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_9.text: *Sweat beads on her forehead. Dark circles under her eyes. I wasn't the only one who didn't sleep tonight. A cold wind from the emergency exit passed between us.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_10.name: Eunsu
day5_lunch_eunsu_10.text: "You always do this. Every time you run. Every time you get caught. Every time from the beginning."

day5_lunch_eunsu_11.name: Eunsu
day5_lunch_eunsu_11.text: "The 1st time, I was angry. That you ran. The 2nd time, I couldn't understand. Why you would leave."

day5_lunch_eunsu_12.name: Eunsu
day5_lunch_eunsu_12.text: "From the 3rd time — I was afraid. Not that you were leaving, but that when you came back, you wouldn't know me."

day5_lunch_eunsu_13.name: Eunsu
day5_lunch_eunsu_13.text: "I hated that. So this time — I wanted to keep you from running."

day5_lunch_eunsu_14.name: Eunsu
day5_lunch_eunsu_14.text: "I thought if I was good to you, you'd stay. If I truly loved you — you wouldn't leave."

day5_lunch_eunsu_16.name: Eunsu
day5_lunch_eunsu_16.text: "...On Day 1, when you walked into the classroom. Even though it was the 13th time — my heart raced."

day5_lunch_eunsu_17.name: Eunsu
day5_lunch_eunsu_17.text: "After 12 times, you'd think I'd be used to it. But those eyes seeing me for the first time. Those eyes with no memory — they hurt every time."

day5_lunch_eunsu_18.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_18.text: *Teacher stopped. In front of the emergency exit. Three meters from me.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_19.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_19.text: *Teacher pulled a syringe from her pocket. Slowly. As if to show me. The liquid inside glinted under the fluorescent light. — This is what erased 12 cycles of memories. One vial of clear liquid.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_21.name: Eunsu
day5_lunch_eunsu_21.text: "One shot and it's all over. The terrible truth, the fear you just felt, even your hatred toward me — all of it. ...Just close your eyes once, {name}."

day5_lunch_eunsu_22.name: Eunsu
day5_lunch_eunsu_22.text: "Back to Day 1. Back to being the {name} who smiles so beautifully."

day5_lunch_eunsu_24.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_24.text: *Only the sound of wind from the emergency exit. The border between the outside world and this school.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_26.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_26.text: *Teacher's hand is shaking. The syringe trembles. A drop falls to the floor.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_27.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_27.text: *Tears fell from Teacher's eyes. She didn't wipe them. Not because she couldn't — because she knew there was no point.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_28.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_28.text: *Time seems frozen. The wind from the emergency exit. Teacher's breathing. My heartbeat. Yuna holding her breath against the wall.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_29.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_29.text: *Syringe and emergency exit. Oblivion and memory. Cage and sky.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_30.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_30.text: *All I have to do is push past and run. She doesn't have the strength to stop me. — But my legs won't move. The body's memory of 12 cycles remembers. That this person's embrace was safe. That this person's hands were warm. That memory — holds me in place.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_31.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_31.text: *Teacher took one more step closer. Now within arm's reach.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_32.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_32.text: *Seolhwa — is visible. Behind Teacher. At the bottom of the stairs. A blurry silhouette. Saying nothing. Just — watching me.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_final.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_final.text: *The screen border pulses red. The clock reads 22:58. Two minutes left.*
